steps.title: Find the agreement signal
steps.content: Both texts note that Weremijewicz and colleagues separated the plants' root systems to block root‑to‑root transmission.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D states that the barriers used in Weremijewicz and colleagues' study effectively excluded root‑to‑root transmission, which matches the agreement highlighted in both texts.
The other three choices either claim sufficiency, propose an impervious barrier, or attribute a finding to He’s study—none of which are supported by both passages.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
